model_comparison: Both models successfully follow the instruction to use a youthful voice. Model 2 (T2) also produces a youthful voice (perhaps sounding slightly younger than T1), but the audio suffers from lower fidelity, sounding like a noisy recording with some breathiness that detracts slightly from the naturalness.
